body:
## What changed

- migrated `CardGame/frontend` lint scripts from no dedicated linter setup to `oxlint`
- migrated `CardGame/backend` lint scripts from `eslint` to `oxlint`
- added frontend and backend `.oxlintrc.json` configs
- removed the backend `eslint.config.js`
- updated both lockfiles for the new lint dependency set

## Scope

This PR only contains lint tooling migration files:

- `CardGame/frontend/package.json`
- `CardGame/frontend/package-lock.json`
- `CardGame/frontend/.oxlintrc.json`
- `CardGame/backend/package.json`
- `CardGame/backend/package-lock.json`
- `CardGame/backend/.oxlintrc.json`
- `CardGame/backend/eslint.config.js`

No application source code changes are included.

## Validation

- ran `npm run lint` in `CardGame/frontend`
- ran `npm run lint` in `CardGame/backend`
- both commands now execute through `oxlint`

## Current lint status

The migration is wired up, but the repositories still have existing violations:

- frontend: 13 current `oxlint` errors
- backend: 14 current `oxlint` errors

Those findings are pre-existing code issues surfaced by the new linter setup, not changes introduced by this PR.
title: chore(tooling): migrate frontend and backend to oxlint
